name: Not Using Complete Mediation
description: The product does not perform access checks on a resource every time it is accessed, allowing users to retain access to a critical resource even after privileges have been revoked. This violates the principle that every access to every object must be checked for authorization.
detection_pattern: INGRESS or STORAGE node provides access to a resource through a path that does not consistently pass through an AUTH node on every access. Look for cached authorization decisions, missing re-validation on subsequent requests, or alternate paths that skip authorization checks.
